title: sopubia mannii var. tenuifolia
intro: Sopubia mannii var. tenuifolia, also known as slender Sopubia, is a plant species belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. It is a parasitic plant that derives its nutrients from other plants. The medicinal properties of Sopubia mannii var. tenuifolia include its ability to inhibit the growth of certain pathogens, making it effective against infections and wounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure and alleviate fever, and herbal preparations often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems.
